title: 30PCS Fresh Flower Care Guide Cards Kraft Paper Flower Care Instructions Hangtags Cards Plant Care Florist Enclosed Note Tag Business Guide with Rope for Flower Shops Business, 3.5 x 2 in
features: Good Quality Floral Care Guide: This 30-piece double-sided floral care guide card is made of good-quality kraft paper, providing durable and reliable information for your flower shop. Each card is designed to help that your fresh flowers stay vibrant.

Easy-to-Follow Instructions: With clear and concise instructions printed on both sides, our floral care guide makes it easy for you or your customers to follow the steps needed to keep flowers looking their best. For example, one of them is to remove leaves below the waterline and change the water every 1-2 days.

What you will receive: Each package includes 30 floral care guide cards, along with a bonus roll of 15cm jute rope. The rope can be used for hanging flower arrangements or securing them in place, adding a rustic and charming touch to your floral displays.

Size: Measuring 3.5 x 2 inches, these floral care guide cards are the perfect size to fit discreetly within vases or alongside your flower arrangements. Providing valuable care information for your customers.

Widey Application: Our floral care guide cards are perfect for flower shops, helping you to provide possible care instructions to your customers. These guide cards will be a valuable addition to your toolkit.
